Reverted 1 edit by [[Special:Contributions/50.214.120.29|50.214.120.29]] ([[User talk:50.214.120.29|talk]]): Unexplained deletion

/* Forest area */ Even though the term "net loss" was used in the UN report, it's misleading, because they really mean "annual net loss". The actual net loss of forest area has obviously INCREASED since 1990, not decreased, hence the passage about the decrease in global forest area in the following paragraph.
